name: 16" x 20" Ancient Fresco Linen Framed Wall Art Print - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description: The 16" x 20" Ancient Fresco Linen Framed Wall Art Print from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee brings modern flair to your interior. A must-have addition to any room, this framed art is sure to give your wall a little personality without overwhelming the decor in the room. This decorative piece is encased in a sleek frame that offers clean style. Additionally, the neutral design seamlessly blends with any decor, making for an easy addition with plenty of flair to match.
